title: spiranthes lanceolata var. luteoalba
intro: Spiranthes lanceolata var. luteoalba, also known as the yellow-flowering ladies' tresses, is a variety of orchid native to North America. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Spiranthes lanceolata var. luteoalba include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made by infusing the roots or flowers in water or other solvents to create teas, tinctures, or infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
